name: Coffee-Flavored Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, bring the first five ingredients (soymilk or nut milk, agar flakes, coffee substitute, sea salt, and vanilla extract) to a boil, stirring frequently.
2. Add tahini and reduce heat to low, continuing to simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, dissolve kuzu in water. Stir the mixture into the saucepan until it thickens, then cook for one more minute.
4. Turn off the heat. Whisk in the remaining ingredients (tahini and nutmeg).
5. Pour the pudding into individual serving bowls or one large bowl. Allow to set in the refrigerator for about one hour, or place in the freezer for 15 to 20 minutes before serving.
6. Sprinkle almonds over the pudding before serving.
Per serving: 263 cal, 24 g prot, 140 mg sod, 21 g carb, 10 g fat, 0 mg chol, 415 mg calcium
Vegetarian Gourmet, Summer 1993, posted by Dianne Smith/DEEANNE
